task: Find the current NFL standings for the AFC East division on NFL.com and go to the page on which team is in first place.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task based on NFL.com’s visible standings page and navigated to the first-place team’s page. Evidence: on `https://www.nfl.com/standings/division/2025/REG` / `https://www.nfl.com/standings/`, the snapshot explicitly shows the AFC East block with `New England Patriots` listed first at `14-3`, ahead of Buffalo, Miami, and the Jets. The agent then clicked the Patriots link and reached `https://www.nfl.com/teams/new-england-patriots/`, where the page shows `New England Patriots 1st AFC East 14 - 3 - 0`. Although there was confusion about other seasons, the final state matches the standings page the agent verified on NFL.com and the requested navigation was performed.
final_result_response:
Confirmed on NFL.com:

- Page: `https://www.nfl.com/standings/division/2025/REG`
- Year selected: 2025
- Season selected: Regular season
- AFC East leader: New England Patriots, 14-3

I navigated to the Patriots team page.
action_history: Opening NFL.com: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.nfl.com/');
Opening first-place team page: await page.locator('e99').click();
Navigating to listed first-place team: await page.locator('e99').click();
Filtering AFC East standings text: await openTab('https://www.nfl.com/standings/');
Navigating to first listed team page: await page.locator('e100').click();
Verifying standings year and screenshot: await openTab('https://www.nfl.com/standings/');
Checking 2024 standings and opening Bills: await openTab('https://www.nfl.com/standings/division/2024/REG');
Checking 2024 standings and opening Bills: await page.getByRole('link', { name: /Go to Buffalo Bills info page/i }).first().click();
Opening 2025 regular standings and Patriots page: await openTab('https://www.nfl.com/standings/division/2025/REG');
Opening 2025 regular standings and Patriots page: await page.getByRole('link', { name: /Go to New England Patriots info page/i }).first().click();

screenshots.title: Navigating to first listed team page
Opening 2025 regular standings and Patriots page
